ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the team */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the team plays */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport associated with the league */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league commissioner */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league operates */,
  "league_logo" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated */,
  "streak" TEXT /* Current win/loss streak */,
  "season" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals scored against the team */,
  "shots_for" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by the team */,
  "shots_against" INTEGER /* Total shots taken against the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_records" (
  "season_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's season record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "overall_record" TEXT /* Overall win-loss-tie record for the season */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team during the season */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals scored against the team during the season */,
  "shots_for" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by the team during the season */,
  "shots_against" INTEGER /* Total shots taken against the team during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "photo" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date the player's contract started */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date the player's contract ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes spent in penalty box */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistics pertain to */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken */,
  "goal_minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes played when scoring goals */,
  "assist_minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes played when providing assists */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the news is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "highlights" (
  "highlight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each highlight */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the highlight is from */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the highlight */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to the video of the highlight */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the highlight */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the highlight in seconds */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the highlight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_highlights_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_highlights_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the fan supports */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Name of the fan */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fan */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Fan's phone number */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the fan joined the system */,
  "fan_club" TEXT /* Name of the fan club the fan belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fans_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan engaging with content */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article engaged with */,
  "highlight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the highlight engaged with */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, share, comment) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment if the engagement type is a comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES news ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_highlight_id FOREIGN KEY ("highlight_id") REFERENCES highlights ("highlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_fan_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_id") REFERENCES fans ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game scheduled */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game will be played */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Predicted score for the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Predicted score for the away team */,
  "predicted_attendance" INTEGER /* Predicted number of spectators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team is in */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the league */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals scored against the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals for and goals against */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user has access to */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
